chain.thought: Explanation: Mika Koivuniemi played in match 25. The subsequent match, number 26, lists Osku Palermaa as the Team Europe player. Therefore, Osku Palermaa was the player who played in the match after Mika Koivuniemi.

judge_thought: Explanation: In match 25, Team Europe’s player is Mika Koivuniemi. The very next match (match 26) lists Team Europe’s player as Osku Palermaa. Therefore, the player to play after Mika Koivuniemi was Osku Palermaa.
